title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is required.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, deep Salesforce/RevOps expertise aligns perfectly, B2B SaaS and Fintech background directly relevant to cloud cost management, and experience scaling revenue operations in high-growth environments matches the $30M+ ARR scaling need.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling RevOps in high-growth B2B SaaS, combined with your Fintech expertise, is exactly what they need to build their GTM operational backbone. The hybrid Tel Aviv/NY model and cross-functional leadership scope across Sales, Marketing, Finance seem tailor-made for your background. Worth a conversation?
